caption: Clipboard Activity
description: Clipboard Activity events report when a process performs an action on the system clipboard.
name: clipboard_activity

1.caption: Copy
1.description: Data was written to the clipboard. The actor process is the source of the data.

2.caption: Paste
2.description: Data was read from the clipboard. The actor process is the target of the paste. When present, source_process is the process from which the data was copied.

3.caption: Clear
3.description: All data was removed from the clipboard.

source_process.description: For a paste activity, the process which copied the data to the clipboard. In other words, actor.process is the process performing the paste and source_process is the process that performed the copy.

clipboard.description: The clipboard that is the target of the actvivity.
